title: Standard Frontmatter Schema
description: Machine-readable frontmatter for RuneContext standards markdown files. Schema version 1.

schema_version.description: Schema version. Unknown versions must fail closed.

id.description: Stable standard identifier. Must match the path-relative stem under `standards/` without the `.md` extension.

tags.description: Optional descriptive tags for discovery and review.

status.description: Standard lifecycle state. Draft standards are not selectable; deprecated standards remain selectable with warnings.

suggested_context_bundles.description: Advisory bundle suggestions only; never authoritative bundle membership.

replaced_by.description: Canonical successor reference for deprecated standards. Must use a `standards/<path>.md` path reference.

aliases.description: Temporary former IDs retained during rename and migration windows.
